Log:
  MFH: r552394

  Update to 0.9.6.12

  This release fixes some bugs in translation of words with non-ASCII
  characters.

  Release notes:
  - https://github.com/soimort/translate-shell/releases/tag/v0.9.6.11
  - https://github.com/soimort/translate-shell/releases/tag/v0.9.6.12

  Also, update LICENSE.
